title: Eye of Nether
description: Add Eyes of Nether for locating Nether Fortresses
body:
# Eye of Nether

Add Eyes of Nether for locating Nether Fortresses.

## Crafting

An _Eye of Nether_ is crafted from a _Ghast Tear_ and an _Ender Pearl_.

## Use

When in the Nether, use (right click) the item in your hand and follow where it goes. The item functions almost identically to an _Eye of Ender_.

## Contributing

Want to report a bug or submit a patch? Email me: <eye-of-nether@slow.network>

I am more than happy to accept back/forward ports to different versions, as well
as just general advice on what I am doing wrong. I have no idea what I am doing
so this mod currently only supports the version of minecraft I happen to be
playing on right now.
